name: Weekly Full Backup - VMware Cluster PROD (Tier-1 workloads, application-aware processing)

result.message: Job failed. Unable to process 3 of 214 objects. Error: Cannot create a shadow copy of the volumes containing writer's data. VSS asynchronous operation is not completed. Operation: [Shadow copy creation]. Code: [0x80042313]. Retry attempt 3 of 3 exhausted for object 'srv-sql-prod-04'. Backup files were written to repository 'REPO-PROD-01' but the restore point is marked as incomplete and will not be used for restore operations.
